creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Things NOT to do in London ❌

London is a top tourist destination for good reason, but there are some common tourist mistakes that you should avoid when you visit the British capital 🇬🇧

Do you have more London tourist mistakes you’d add to the list? ✌️

#london #londontravel #traveltips #lovegreatbritain

transcription.text: Don't do this in London. Don't tip without checking the bill. Most restaurants in 2024 are already adding a 12.5% service charge. Don't assume it's always cold and rainy. It does get warm in the summertime. Don't take the sightseeing buses. Just go on the normal bus and take route 24, 11 or 9 and pay £1.50 instead of £25. But also don't take the bus during rush hour and waste your day sitting in traffic. Don't take a taxi from the airports. They're extremely expensive and again traffic in London isn't pretty. Don't buy individual tickets on the tube. Just use your contactless card or pay with your phone. And if you think the Brits are just too polite just try and stand on the left side of the escalators on the underground and then I'm sure you'll experience a whole new side of the locals.
